description.value: For one minute, you stop stealing and simply live inside the current. Every weave finds its harmony naturally.

system.benefits: Once per long rest, you can enter a state of "Perfect Harmony" for 1 minute. During this time, every weave you cast automatically benefits from Harmonic Weaving (reroll one die per weave) without expending uses. You still have your normal Harmonic uses after this ends

usage.text: Once per long rest, 1 minute duration
